notes: Played for about 35 minutes. Ran out of the box no issues at 4k. I picked the sandbox mode which is overloaded with zombies and weapons. General performance in a closed area was 50-60 fps, out in the open area was around 30-40. Story mode performance might be better as there are less zombies on screen. Considering my hardware I gave this a gold based on the lower fps, but I haven't compared against windows, otherwise it would have been platinum.
title: Dead Rising 2: Off the Record

notes: Must be installed to an EXT filesystem, not a NTFS due to file permisson problems
title: Dead Rising 2: Off the Record
